nasb.text: And the lord of that slave felt compassion and released him and forgave him the debt.

esv.text: And out of pity for him, the master of that servant released him and forgave him the debt.

cnv.text: 主人動了慈心，把那僕人放了，並且免了他的債。

ccb.text: 王可怜他，不但释放了他，而且免了他全部的债。

csbs.text: 那奴仆的主人动了怜悯之心，把他释放了，并且免了他的债。
